---
title: "Claude Code Skills for tidymodels"
---

## Welcome

Claude Code skills help you build tidymodels packages and perform data analysis with AI assistance. These skills guide Claude Code through complex tasks with domain-specific knowledge.

## Choose Your Path

::: {.path-card}
### 📊 Analysts & Data Scientists

Use tidymodels for machine learning and modeling workflows.

[Explore User Skills →](users/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.path-card}
### 🔧 Extension Developers

Create new tidymodels packages and contribute to the ecosystem.

[Explore Developer Skills →](developers/index.qmd)
:::

## Featured Skills

::: {.skill-card}
![](assets/logos/tidymodels.png){.skill-logo}

**[Tabular Data Machine Learning](users/tidymodels.qmd)**

Build predictive models for tabular data with proper validation practices. Learn data splitting, resampling, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
![](assets/logos/yardstick.png){.skill-logo}

**[Create Custom Metrics](developers/add-yardstick-metric.qmd)**

Build new performance metrics for evaluating model predictions with the yardstick package.
:::

::: {.skill-card}
![](assets/logos/recipes.png){.skill-logo}

**[Create Preprocessing Steps](developers/add-recipe-step.qmd)**

Develop custom preprocessing steps for feature engineering with the recipes package.
:::

## Getting Started

New to Claude Code skills? Start with our [Getting Started Guide](getting-started.qmd) to learn:

- How to install and configure Claude Code
- How to use skills in your workflow
- Prerequisites for different skill types
- Your first skill walkthrough

## About

This site provides Claude Code skills maintained for the [tidymodels](https://tidymodels.org) ecosystem. Each skill contains detailed instructions, examples, and reference materials to help Claude Code assist you effectively.
